channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: All the bins in Horn Park are overflowing, 16th June
item.description:
Please empty the bins

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Winn Road, Horn Park, Greater London

item.title: Fly tipped rubbish, 16th June
item.description:
Rubbish keeps getting dumped in same area ! Cameras might help

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Alsike Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple waste bags obstructing the pavement outside 166 Elderfield Road., 16th June
item.description:
Around 12 waste bags are dumped on the public pavement today outside 166 Elderfield Road by the residents. The pile completely blocks the footpath, creating a safety hazard for pedestrians and wheelchairs. Please arrange for immediate clearance. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Elderfield Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime bike van repeatedly parking dangerously, illegally and across cycle path, 16th June
item.description:
On multiple but four recorded occasions lime bike drivers park illegally and dangerously. I have asked for them to park considerately, but they simply smirk and couldn’t care less. I’ve reported to Lime.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shepherdess Walk, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 16th June
item.description:
Usual graffiti on bins and on the hoarding around that building. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ontario Street, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement access again prevented dangerous obstructions, 16th June
item.description:
Despite notice forgiven by the council this Neighbor) persist in obstructing the pathway reporting when I see this happening so that you can finally appreciate the pattern of behaviour towards others

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Greenside, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox on the street, 16th June
item.description:
I reported that there has been a dead fix on the pedestrian and Monday I received tgat the problem has been fixed. It is not! There are children passing by too.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Armstrong Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree has been knocked over somehow, ripped from the trunk, 16th June
